name: Party Chicken-- Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup, undiluted
Parsley or pimiento strips for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 9 x 9-inch casserole dish.
2. Bone the crabmeat and place it on the bottom of the dish.
3. Make stuffing according to package directions and place it on top of the crabmeat.
4. Skin the chicken breasts and lay them over the stuffing.
5. Sprinkle parsley or pimiento, salt, and pepper over the chicken.
6. Add one can of mushroom soup (undiluted) and sprinkle with paprika.
7. Bake, uncovered, at 325°F for 1½ hours.
8. Serves 4
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV ed. 1974
